name: AI Security & Compliance News Digest
description: Searches for the latest security, privacy, and compliance news via Exa, uses Claude AI to categorize, summarize, and prioritize the articles, then sends a formatted HTML digest via Gmail and posts a summary to Slack. Adapted from n8n's intelligent AI digest for security feeds.

source.originalName: Intelligent AI digest for security, privacy, and compliance feeds

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for security news search

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for sending the digest

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting summary

emailRecipient.description: Email address to send the daily digest

slackChannel.description: Slack channel for the digest summary

focusKeywords.description: Specific keywords to prioritize (e.g. 'GDPR, SOC 2, ransomware')

steps.name: Build search queries for each security category
Search security news across all categories
Build Claude prompt for security digest
